developer_response.body:
Hi 
You are right. Lots of work needed. Currently the project is not receiving funding support and this early access version is meant for raising funding. You may kindly return the game if the game is not worth the amount you spent. Thank you very much for your kind consideration to try out the early access

reviews.review_description:
MetaJourney – Long Way Home blends adventure and racing simulation into a calm, purposeful driving experience. One of the highlights is the manual car driving, with smooth and intuitive gear changes that add a welcome layer of realism and immersion.

You drive across open environments, picking up passengers and completing missions, while focusing on choosing the right paths and managing your driving rather than pure arcade speed. The experience feels thoughtful and relaxed, more about the journey than rushing to the finish line.

The crafted soundtrack perfectly complements the road-trip vibe and makes long drives genuinely enjoyable. Overall, this is a fun and accessible experience that will appeal to both driving fans and players looking for a laid-back VR adventure.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the wonderful review
